summary: Full backend and frontend testing of INKFLOW blog app. 15/15 backend tests passed. Core flows (login, post creation, post detail, comments, admin dashboard) working. One critical bug: user registration is broken due to backend requiring 'username' field which is not present in frontend form.

ui_bugs.issue: Users and Categories stat cards always show 0 on load because data is only fetched when tabs are clicked, not on mount

integration_issues.issue: Registration always fails with 'username field is required' error. Frontend form has First name, Last name, Email, Password but no Username field. Backend serializer has username as required field. validate_username method tries to handle empty string but field-level validation blocks it ('This field may not be blank.'). Fix: add `required=False, allow_blank=True` to username field in RegisterSerializer OR add username input to frontend form.

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix user registration - backend serializer requires username but frontend form doesn't have username field. Fix: In /app/backend/accounts/serializers.py, modify the username field to allow blank: add `extra_kwargs = {'username': {'required': False, 'allow_blank': True}}` or make username field `required=False, allow_blank=True`.
MEDIUM: Admin dashboard stat cards for Users and Categories show 0 on load - fetch counts on component mount, not only when tab is clicked.
critical_code_review_comments: RegisterSerializer: username field needs `required=False, allow_blank=True` since frontend auto-derives username from email via the validate_username method but serializer-level validation blocks empty strings.
AdminDashboard.js: Stats (users.length, categories.length) are computed from state that's only populated on tab click - should fetch counts on mount or use separate stats API.
seed_data_creation: Created: TEST_Blog Post Automation (published), UI Test Post Published (published) via tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Registration is broken. After fix, test register with testuser2@blog.com. Admin dashboard 0 stats for users/categories is a separate minor issue. All other flows (login, write post, post detail, AI summary, comments, admin dashboard, search, category filter) are working correctly.

rca_of_issue.root_cause: RegisterSerializer in /app/backend/accounts/serializers.py has 'username' in fields list which makes it required by default. The validate_username method (line 31-33) tries to handle empty string by deriving from email, but DRF field-level validation runs before validate_username and rejects blank/missing username with 'This field may not be blank' or 'This field is required'.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Go to /auth page, click Register link, fill First name, Last name, Email, Password, click Create Account. Error: 'username This field is required.'
rca_of_issue.mitigation: In accounts/serializers.py RegisterSerializer, add to Meta: extra_kwargs = {'username': {'required': False, 'allow_blank': True}} OR add username CharField with required=False, allow_blank=True explicitly.
